history.content:
<thought>
The goal is visible at row 05, column F. I am at row 07, column D facing upward. The cell directly ahead is safe, so moving forward takes me closer to the goal while avoiding the lava cells to the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The cell directly ahead is now lava, so I must not move forward. Turning right will face me toward the open safe route instead of the hazard.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right, and the cell directly ahead is safe floor. Moving forward keeps me progressing through the open path while avoiding the lava nearby.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
